name: ASRock Rack TURIND12M3-2Q/E810 Server Motherboard - 9.6" x 13.39" - Single Socket SP5 (LGA 6096) - TDP up to 400W - 12x DIMM (Supports DDR5 RDIMM, RDIMM-3DS) - 2x PCIe5.0 / CXL2.0 x16 - 2x M.2 ports - 2x SFP28 (25GbE) by Intel E810 (TURIND12M3-2Q/E810)
shortName: ASRock Rack TURIND12M3-2Q/E810 Server Motherboard - 9.6" x 13.39"
description: High-performance server motherboard with SP5 socket, DDR5 RDIMM support, and 25GbE connectivity.
